news.title: Fed Balance Sheet Reaches $6.7 Trillion as Liquidity Resilience Persists
news.desc: As of May 13, 2026, the Federal Reserve's balance sheet stands at $6.728 trillion, reflecting a complex tug-of-war between structural QT runoff and Reserve Management Purchase (RMP) operations that have been offsetting reserve drains. The data highlights ongoing liquidity management challenges as the Fed navigates post-QT policy.

news.title: U.S. Bank Reserves Edge Higher to $3.12 Trillion, Signaling Ample Liquidity
news.desc: Reserve balances held at Federal Reserve Banks rose to $3.117 trillion, up from $3.051 trillion, signaling that banking system liquidity remains ample despite the Fed's balance sheet normalization efforts. The rise suggests RMP operations and TGA dynamics are supporting reserve levels.

news.title: 美联储5月大幅削减国库券购买：RMP计划第二次缩减
news.desc: 2026年5月14日，美联储将国库券购买规模从250亿美元降至100亿美元，为RMP（储备管理购买）计划第二次大幅缩减。此次削减基于银行准备金已回升至3.05万亿美元的水平，表明美联储认为流动性充足程度已允许进一步缩减干预操作。
